text:
In the first moment, I am struck by the emptiness and tranquility of the room, disturbed only by the quiet presence of another person lying on the floor. The stillness here invites contemplation; I feel a soft curiosity mixed with a slight unease, as if I am intruding upon an unspoken ritual.

Moving to the next space, I am confronted by the bold, colorful display of the 'R+D' exhibit—a temple to human ingenuity and our evolving relationship with technology. The screens and text provocatively invite me to reflect on what it means to coexist with intelligent machines. I feel invigorated and thoughtful here, as though I am witness to the shaping of the future, experiencing the intersection of art, science, and philosophy in a tangible form.
